name_cn:
『Burberry』
BURBERRY🇬🇧Burberry classic structured Benana bag is back in stock!! 🎁Decoration features vintage check from the brand's 1960s, accented with equestrian-inspired leather elements. A super versatile piece. 40598 Size: 27.5*18*12cm
